practice.name: Problem 10 (2015 AIME II)
practice.statement: This is a 2015 AIME II problem focusing on Ceva's theorem and power of a point. See the full problem statement on [AoPS](https://artofproblemsolving.com/wiki/index.php/2015_AIME_II_Problems/Problem_10).

practice.name: Problem 15 (2017 AIME II)
practice.statement: This is a 2017 AIME II problem focusing on homothety transformations. See the full problem statement on [AoPS](https://artofproblemsolving.com/wiki/index.php/2017_AIME_II_Problems/Problem_15).
